title: Lowe's stock jumps 3.9% premarket after earnings top estimates and company raises guidance
text: Lowe's Inc. LOW, +2.04% said Wednesday it had net income of $154 million, or 25 cents a share, in the third quarter, down from $1.896 billion, or $2.73 a share, in the year-earlier period. The net income figure includes a pretax noncash asset impairment charge of $2.1 billion related to the company's Canadian retail business.

title: LOWE'S REPORTS THIRD QUARTER 2022 SALES AND EARNINGS RESULTS

(NYSE: LOW) today reported net earnings of $154 million and diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.25 for the quarter ended Oct. 28, 2022, which included a pre-tax non-cash asset impairment charge of $2.1 billion related to its Canadian retail business, compared to diluted EPS of $2.73 in the third quarter of 2021.

title: Lowe's Announces Sale of Canadian Retail Business to Sycamore Partners

title: LOWE'S SALUTES MILITARY COMMUNITY THIS VETERANS DAY, CALLING ON CONSUMERS TO SHOW THANKS WITH BLUE WREATHS
text: Lowe's to donate $1, up to $50,000, for each eligible item purchased on Lowes.com from the Blue Wreath Project collection to nonprofit partner Building Homes for Heroes MOORESVILLE, N.C. , Nov. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- For the second year, this Veterans Day, Lowe's is calling upon consumers across the U.S. to #BuildThanks and show appreciation for military neighbors with a simple gesture – adorning their doors with a blue wreath.
